ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Deployment Completed
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Ticket #12345 has been resolved. The associated GitHub PR #9876 has been merged and deployed to production.

Please verify the changes and let me know if any further action is needed.

Thanks,
DevOps

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Overdue – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Your QuickBooks invoice #QB20260415 is overdue. Immediate action required to avoid service interruption.

Please login to QuickBooks at <URL> and verify your payment details.

If you do not pay within 48 hours, your account will be suspended.

Thank you,
QuickBooks Support Team
